docket_entries.description: GENERAL DENIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT AZRILYAN, ELENA
NOTICE REQUESTING AND REQUIRING PARTIES TO ATTEND TRIAL (TRANSACTION ID # 17234008) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-05-2017. ROGER JACKSON APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. MARIE NOEL APPEL APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REPRESENTATION FROM PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. JUDGE: SUZANNE R. BOLANOS; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
